---
title: "Teaching"
---

## London School of Economics and Political Science

**Department of Economics**

| Term | Course |
|------|--------|
| Fall 2025 | EC2C3 · Econometrics I |
| Winter 2026 | EC2C1 · Econometrics II |

## University of Toronto

**Department of Economics** · Sept 2021 – Apr 2022

| Term | Course |
|------|--------|
| Fall 2021 | [ECO372](https://artsci.calendar.utoronto.ca/course/eco372h1) · Data Analysis and Applied Econometrics in Practice |
| Winter 2022 | [ECO102](https://artsci.calendar.utoronto.ca/course/eco102h1) · Principles of Macroeconomics |

## Monash University

**Department of Econometrics and Business Statistics** · Feb 2018 – Jul 2021

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| [ETC1000](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ETC1000?year=2021) | Business and Economic Statistics |
| [ETC2410](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ETC2410?year=2021) | Introductory Econometrics |
| [ETC3400](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ETC3400?year=2021) | Principles of Econometrics |
| [ETC3460](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ETC3460?year=2021) | Financial Econometrics |
| [ETF3600](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ETF3600?year=2021) | Quantitative Analysis of Limited Dependent Variables *(Caulfield)* |
| [ETF5930](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ETF5930?year=2021) | Financial Econometrics *(Caulfield)* |
| [ETX2250](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ETX2250) | Data Visualisation and Analytics |

**Department of Finance** · Feb 2019 – Dec 2020

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| [BFC3241](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/BFC3241?year=2021) | Equities and Investment Analysis |

**Department of Economics** · Aug 2018 – Dec 2019

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| [ECC1000](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ECC1000?year=2021) | Principles of Microeconomics |
| [ECC1100](https://handbook.monash.edu/2021/units/ECC1100?year=2021) | Principles of Macroeconomics |

## University of Melbourne

**Melbourne Business School** · Feb 2020 – May 2020

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| [BUSA90499](https://handbook.unimelb.edu.au/2021/subjects/busa90499) | Introduction to Business Problems |
| [BUSA90500](https://handbook.unimelb.edu.au/2021/subjects/busa90500) | Business Analytics Foundations (Statistical Learning I) |
